no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The bead-specific changes are implemented and staged, but the required repo gate is not green from this worktree. `go test ./cmd` and `CGO_ENABLED=1 lefthook run pre-commit` both fail in the existing `cli/cmd` package before any metric-related regression can be committed. The failing checks are unrelated to the bead scope: `cli/cmd/installation_acceptance_test.go` has multiple pre-existing installation failures, and `cli/cmd/routinglint_test.go` fails on `agent_route_status.go:413`. Fixing those would require out-of-scope changes to unrelated command surfaces.
